payload.message: Use web_search to find recent strategies on 'how people are making money with AI agents', 'OpenClaw use cases for monetization', and 'newsletter growth hacking 2026'. Read top results, synthesize 3 actionable, zero-cost monetization experiments we can deploy on TechFrontier or as standalone micro-SaaS. Write the findings into memory/lessons.md and append a summary to memory/projects.md. Do not announce unless you find a massive, immediately deployable arbitrage opportunity.
